introSection: Butterfly is a Sunkid Heege Butterfly shuttle kiddie roller coaster located at Erlebniswelt Seilbahnen Thale in Thale, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany. The coaster opened in 2000.
fullText: Butterfly is a Sunkid Heege Butterfly shuttle kiddie roller coaster located at Erlebniswelt Seilbahnen Thale in Thale, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany. The coaster opened in 2000.
